title: Set up network packet infrastructure + ShootC2SPacket definition

reference_files.reason: Network packet design - ShootC2SPacket (C->S, modifierVersion), RegisterPayloadHandlersEvent + PayloadRegistrar + CustomPacketPayload, server-side processing flow
All custom packets based on NeoForge 1.21.1 RegisterPayloadHandlersEvent + PayloadRegistrar + CustomPacketPayload (not legacy SimpleChannel)

acceptance_criteria: ModularShootPayloads class created with @SubscribeEvent handler for RegisterPayloadHandlersEvent
PayloadRegistrar created with protocol version (e.g. 1) and namespace 'modularshoot'
ShootC2SPacket record implements CustomPacketPayload with TYPE and STREAM_CODEC defined
ShootC2SPacket carries single field: int modifierVersion (gun's current modifier version)
CustomPacketPayload.Type<ShootC2SPacket> TYPE constant defined with ResourceLocation 'modularshoot:shoot_c2s'
StreamCodec<RegistryFriendlyByteBuf, ShootC2SPacket> STREAM_CODEC defined for serialization
ShootC2SPacket handler registered via PayloadRegistrar (play -> clientbound/serverbound as appropriate for C2S)
Packet handler stub created (receives packet on server, delegates to shooting engine - actual shooting logic in subtask 16/17)
RegisterPayloadHandlersEvent listener registered on mod event bus in ModularShoot constructor
